title: Arabidopsis RNA-seq seedling small training set (chr1 100k)
author: Frederik Coppens
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Arabidopsis seedling small training set for RNA-seq. FastQ files for reads mapping to the first 100k of the first chromosome of Arabidopsis are included. The sequencing was done using Illumina, 100 paired-end mode.
steps_raw: Arabidopsis seedling small training set for RNA-seq. FastQ files for reads mapping to the first 100k of the first chromosome of Arabidopsis are included. The sequencing was done using Illumina, 100 paired-end mode.
